notes: Auto Dimension v1 schema. 'scan' carries small global state (currently only the discipline that opens by default). 'profiles' is the per-binding dimensioning configuration: one entry per ticked subcategory. 'measurement_reference' must be one of the strategy_keys that applies to the profile's category - centreline / outside_face / outside_edge / inside_face / inside_edge / top / bottom / invert_level (varies per category, see measurement_strategies/__init__.REGISTRY). 'reference_target' is currently only 'nearest_grid' in v1. 'current_view_only' must stay true in v1 - multi-view dispatch is on the v2 list. Override per project at <project>/.bim/auto_dimension.json.
